headline: Campaign 'Summer Sale - Prospecting' CPA jumped 62% above its 30-day average in the last 24 hours.
trigger_condition: CPA rose more than 50% above the trailing 30-day average (threshold: +50%).
likely_cause: Audience fatigue: CTR fell 39% while frequency climbed to 4.2, indicating the prospecting audience has seen the creative too many times.
recommended_action: Pause 'Static - Discount 20%' and refresh the prospecting creative within 24h; expected saving Rs. 9,000-11,000 over the next 3 days if acted on now.
